name: Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pulley, bushing, and other mechanical transmission parts in China. It provides pulleys, gears, sprockets, timing pulleys, couplings, locking assemblies, bushes, gear motors, machine tool accessories, industrial belts, and other machinery spare parts. The company also offers its products through online. Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. also exports its products to the regions of Europe, North America, Asia and Africa. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Dwan Drive Machinery Limited Liability Company and changed its name to Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2015. Sichuan Dawn Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Meishan, China.
